name_cn:
Genuine Grade
🌟Woven Straw 3-in-1
This pure hand-woven 3-in-1 design is fantastic 👏👏 Multi-functional with complex craftsmanship that looks especially grand/fashionable. The favorite part is the small bag hanging on the strap (mini bag) that maximizes the premium feel~
Size: 23L x 16H x 7W cm
Style: 1BH204
